topic.what: Privacy-preserving QA agent enabling free-form queries over personal CGM data without cloud transmission
topic.how: Three-layer pipeline decoupling LLM reasoning from local computation; raw glucose never leaves device; agent receives only aggregated metrics
topic.why_matters: Enables personalized on-demand health insights while eliminating privacy risks of cloud-based LLM deployment; addresses gap between rich CGM data and rigid static summaries in existing platforms

characteristics.what_it_measures: Correctness of agent answers on benchmark queries
characteristics.evidence: Evaluation of 6 leading LLMs on 4,180 questions; synthetic queries achieve 94% value accuracy
characteristics.context: Synthetic template-generated questions with deterministic ground truth

characteristics.what_it_measures: Correctness on ambiguous real-world user queries
characteristics.evidence: Real user queries collected via interviews with CGM users
characteristics.context: Real-world ambiguous questions expose intent and temporal disambiguation challenges

characteristics.what_it_measures: Total number of QA pairs in evaluation dataset
characteristics.context: Combination of template-generated and real user queries with ground truth from deterministic execution

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of individuals in CGM data for evaluation
characteristics.evidence: 11 T1D from AZT1D + 8 T2D from ShanghaiT2DM datasets
characteristics.context: Covers Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes with varying duration (24-179 days) and sampling intervals (5-15 min)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether raw CGM data leaves user device
characteristics.vs_baseline: Cloud-based LLM approaches transmit raw data
characteristics.evidence: LLM receives only aggregated metrics; all computation in local sandbox
characteristics.context: Honest-but-Curious threat model; aggregated metrics with low temporal resolution provide re-identification protection

characteristics.what_it_measures: Performance of lightweight vs large models
characteristics.evidence: Lightweight models achieve competitive accuracy on well-structured queries
characteristics.context: Enables low-cost deployment on personal devices

not_for: Questions requiring external modalities (meals, insulin, exercise logs)

novelty: Privacy-preserving agent architecture keeping raw CGM data local
Deterministic ground truth via program execution (not human annotation)
Three-layer modular pipeline enabling targeted component evaluation
Benchmark with 4,180 questions combining clinical templates and real user queries including unanswerable/proxy categories
open_problems: Intent disambiguation for ambiguous real-world queries
Improving accuracy on proxy questions requiring approximate time-window mapping
